zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann II. zur Lippe於1175年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 索斯特利普斯塔特時，他的父親Bernhard II. zur Lippe36歲，母親Heilwig von Are Hochstaden24歲。他和Oda von Tecklenburg至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1229年4月25日在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克哈斯爾根享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hermann II. zur Lippe于1175年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 索斯特利普斯塔特时，他的父亲Bernhard II. zur Lippe36岁，母亲Heilwig von Are Hochstaden24岁。他和Oda von Tecklenburg至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1229年4月25日在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克哈斯爾根享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann II. zur Lippe was born in 1175, in Lippstadt, Soest, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Bernhard II. zur Lippe, was 36 and his mother, Heilwig von Are Hochstaden, was 24. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Oda von Tecklenburg. He died on 25 April 1229, in Hasbergen, Osnabrück, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann II. zur Lippe est né en 1175, à Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Bernhard II. zur Lippe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Heilwig von Are Hochstaden, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Oda von Tecklenburg. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1229, à Hasbergen, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann II. zur Lippe 1175 in Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernhard II. zur Lippe 36 und seine Mutter Heilwig von Are Hochstaden 24. Er hatte mit Oda von Tecklenburg mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1229 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hasbergen, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann II. zur Lippe è nato il nel 1175 nel Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Bernhard II. zur Lippe, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Heilwig von Are Hochstaden, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Oda von Tecklenburg. Morì il 25 aprile 1229, nel Hasbergen, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann II. zur Lippeが1175年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ソエストリップスタトで生まれた時，父Bernhard II. zur Lippeは36歳，母Heilwig von Are Hochstadenは24歳であった。彼はOda von Tecklenburgとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1229年4月25日にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オスナブルuックハスバージェンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann II. zur Lippe(이)가 1175년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 크레이스 소스트 립스타드트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernhard II. zur Lippe(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilwig von Are Hochstaden(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Oda von Tecklenburg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1229년 4월 25일 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 오스나브u크 하스버겐에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann II. zur Lippe nasceu em 1175, em Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Bernhard II. zur Lippe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Heilwig von Are Hochstaden, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Oda von Tecklenburg. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1229, em Hasbergen, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann II. zur Lippe родился в 1175 г. в местности липпстадт, крис соест, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Bernhard II. zur Lippe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilwig von Are Hochstaden, 24. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Oda von Tecklenburg. Он умер 25 апреля 1229 г. в местности хасбиржен, ландкрис оснабрuкк, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hermann II. zur Lippe nació en 1175, en Lippstadt, Kreis Soest, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Bernhard II. zur Lippe, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Heilwig von Are Hochstaden, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Oda von Tecklenburg. Murió el 25 de abril de 1229, en Hasbergen, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 54 años.
